name: Tetes De Violon a L'ail (Garlic-flavoured Fiddleheads)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the fiddleheads until just tender.
2. In a frying pan, heat butter and sauté garlic and shallots until softened.
3. Blend in soy sauce, sugar, and white wine.
4. Add the steamed fiddleheads to the pan and turn them to coat well with the sauce.
5. Serve immediately. SERVES: 4
